name: drupal-recipe/geofield-map-marker-demo
description: Composer dependencies required to run the geofield_map_marker module, my_places theme, and this Drupal recipe on a fresh Drupal 10/11 site.

suggest.drupal/twig_tweak: Useful Twig helpers for templates (e.g. drupal_field, drupal_block).
suggest.drupal/pathauto: Generates clean URL aliases for map_item nodes automatically.

notes: geocoder_field is a sub-module of drupal/geocoder — no separate Composer package required.
GSAP: download from https://www.npmjs.com/package/gsap and place gsap.min.js at web/libraries/gsap/minified/gsap.min.js
in-view: download from https://www.npmjs.com/package/in-view and place in-view.min.js at web/libraries/in-view/in-view.min.js
Replace INSERT_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in config files before applying the recipe.
